infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Soapies uses the camera so you can take profile photos and attach images to posts and messages.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Soapies accesses your photo library so you can upload profile photos and attach images to posts and messages.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Soapies saves event photos to your library when you choose to download them.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Soapies uses your approximate location to show you nearby members in Pulse and nearby events.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Soapies uses the microphone if you choose to record a voice note in a message.
